description_long: This coatrack is a tall, slender vertical post constructed from dark metal, featuring a series of evenly spaced hooks protruding from one side. The hooks are robust and hexagonal in shape, designed to securely hold coats, hats, or bags. The post itself has a square cross-section, providing stability and a modern industrial aesthetic. The top and bottom ends of the post are flat, with no visible decorative finials or embellishments. The surface appears slightly textured, likely to resist scratches and wear in high-traffic urban environments. Its utilitarian design suggests it is intended for practical use in public or communal spaces.
description: A tall, dark metal coatrack with four hexagonal hooks on one side and a square, textured post. Its minimalist, industrial design is practical and sturdy.
description_view_0: The coatrack is seen from the side, clearly showing four protruding hexagonal hooks aligned vertically along the post.
description_view_1: Viewed from the front, the coatrack appears as a narrow post with the hooks visible as small protrusions along the length.
description_view_2: This side view mirrors view 0, again displaying the four hooks, but from the opposite side, confirming the hooks are only on one face.
description_view_3: From the back, the coatrack shows no hooks, just the plain, square post with a consistent dark finish.
